description: You are an environmental consultant at EnviroTech Solutions. Format the Phase I Environmental Site Assessment (ESA) report for the former Riverside Industrial Complex (/home/ga/Documents/phase1_esa_report.odt) to comply with the ASTM E1527-21 standards detailed in /home/ga/Desktop/esa_formatting_spec.txt. Apply the required heading styles, title formatting, table of contents, and margins as defined in the specification. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/phase1_esa_report.odt.

body_alignment_samples: EnviroTech Solutions was retained by Consolidated Development Group
The subject property is located at 4500 Industrial Boulevard
A search of environmental databases was conducted
The site reconnaissance was conducted on October 15, 2025
Based on the findings of this Phase I ESA
metadata.source: Original content based on ASTM E1527-21 ESA framework
